title: Buttery Crispy Croatian Pastry Pierogi
description: A delicious show-off dish featuring crispy pastry, dill pickles, and namul-blanch-season. A perfect high-protein option for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: unsalted butter, softened
ingredients.notes: chilled in the refrigerator for 30 minutes

instructions: Combine flour, softened butter, egg, and salt in a bowl to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter.
Place a rounded tablespoon of grated cheese, chopped pickles, and namul-blanch-season in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add a small amount of oil to the skillet and cook the pierogi for 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Serve hot with a side of sour cream or applesauce.
